description: National Guard base
description_wiki: Camp Perry is a National Guard training facility located on the shore of Lake Erie in northern Ohio near Port Clinton.

description: census-designated place in Pulaski County, Missouri, United States
description_wiki: Fort Leonard Wood is a U.S. Army training installation located in the Missouri Ozarks.

description: city in and county seat of King County, State of Washington, United States
description_wiki: Seattle (  see-AT-əl) is the most populous city in the U.S. state of Washington and the Pacific Northwest region of North America.

description: airborne combat engineer battalion in the United States Army
description_wiki: The 37th Engineer Battalion ("Eagle Battalion") was an airborne engineer battalion in the United States Army, subordinate to the 2d Brigade Combat Team, 82d Airborne Division, based at Fort Bragg, North Carolina.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: California () is a state in the Western United States that lies on the Pacific Coast.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki:
Florida (  FLORR-ih-də; Spanish: [floˈɾiða] ) is a state in the Southeastern and South Atlantic
regions of the United States.

description: county seat of St. Lucie County, Florida, United States
description_wiki: Fort Pierce is a city in and the county seat of St.

description: independent city in Virginia, United States
description_wiki: Norfolk (locally   NOR-fək) is an independent city in the U.S. commonwealth of Virginia.

description: Virginia Army National Guard installation near Blackstone, Virginia, United States
description_wiki: Fort Pickett, formerly Fort Barfoot, is a Virginia Army National Guard installation, located near the town of Blackstone, Virginia.

description: capital and largest city of Massachusetts, United States
description_wiki: Boston () is the capital and most populous city of the U.S. state of Massachusetts.

description: city in Wales
description_wiki: Swansea ( SWON-zee; Welsh: Abertawe [abɛrˈtawɛ]) is a port and coastal city and the second-largest city of Wales.

description: president of the United States from 1953 to 1961 (1890–1969)
description_wiki: Dwight David "Ike" Eisenhower (born David Dwight Eisenhower; October 14, 1890 – March 28, 1969) was the 34th president of the United States, serving from 1953 to 1961.

description: country in Central Europe
description_wiki: Germany, officially the Federal Republic of Germany, is a country in Western and Central Europe.

description: village in East Devon, England
description_wiki: Lympstone is a village and civil parish in East Devon, in the English county of Devon.

description: arm of the Atlantic Ocean that separates southern England from northern France
description_wiki: The English Channel, also known as the Channel, is an arm of the Atlantic Ocean that separates Southern England from northern France.

description: maritime branch of the United States military
description_wiki: The United States Navy (USN) is the maritime service branch of the United States Armed Forces and is designated as the navy of the United States in the Constitution.

description: city in Ashtabula County, Ohio, USA
description_wiki: Ashtabula ( ASH-tə-BYU-lə) is the most populous city in Ashtabula County, Ohio, United States.

description: 1944 one of the five sectors of the Allied invasion of German-occupied France
description_wiki: Omaha Beach was one of five Allied beach landing sectors of the amphibious assault component of Operation Overlord during the Second World War.

description: United States Army medal for gallantry
description_wiki: The Distinguished Service Cross (DSC) is the United States Army's second highest military decoration for soldiers who display extraordinary heroism in combat with an armed enemy force.

description: Allied convoy route during WWII
description_wiki: The Red Ball Express was an American truck convoy system that supplied Allied forces moving through Europe after breaking out from the D-Day beaches in Normandy in the summer of 1944.

surface_forms: the invasion in the French coast
description: 1944 landing operations of the Allied invasion of Normandy
description_wiki: The Normandy landings were the landing operations and associated airborne operations on 6 June 1944 of the Allied invasion of Normandy in Operation Overlord during the Second World War.

description: country in Western Europe and other continents (through its overseas territories in America, Africa and Oceania)
description_wiki: France, officially the French Republic, is a country primarily located in Western Europe.

description: country in western Europe
description_wiki: Belgium, officially the Kingdom of Belgium, is a country in Northwestern Europe.

description: region and former province in the western Netherlands
description_wiki: Holland is a geographical region and former province on the western coast of the Netherlands.

surface_forms: Rangers, to get rid of the pillboxes
description: elite military formation of the United States Army
description_wiki: The United States Army Rangers are U.S. Army personnel who have served in any unit which has held the official designation of "Ranger".
